height="150" width="160" x="800" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vWTF2GvCP_Uw3qWAGXaK-55" parent="vWTF2GvCP_Uw3qWAGXaK-54" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font style="font-size: 20px;">5</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="60" x="46" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vWTF2GvCP_Uw3qWAGXaK-61" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font style="font-size: 15px; color: rgb(255, 51, 51);"><b>大端的操作系统，会将内存中的多字节类型，按照高位低地址的类型排布。所以直接放入报文的话是这样的</b></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="300" x="-120" y="-230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vWTF2GvCP_Uw3qWAGXaK-62" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font style="font-size: 15px; color: rgb(255, 51, 51);"><b>小端的操作系统，会将内存中的多字节类型，按照低位低地址的类型排布。所以直接放入报文的话是这样的</b></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="300" x="-110" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vWTF2GvCP_Uw3qWAGXaK-63" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font color="#ff3333"><span style="font-size: 15px;"><b>char是单字节表示，在内存中逐个排列。所以不受大小端影响</b></span></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="300" x="-90" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vWTF2GvCP_Uw3qWAGXaK-64" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font color="#ff3333"><span style="font-size: 15px;"><b>大端小端影响的是一种数据类型在内存中的排列顺序，但是对于类型之间的排布，还是按照先来的放在低地址进行排列</b></span></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="670" x="250" y="-320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 298px; height: 1px; padding-top: 195px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.b: 大端的操作系统，会将内存中的多字节类型，按照高位低地址的类型排布。所以直接放入报文的话是这样的

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 298px; height: 1px; padding-top: 465px; margin-left: 11px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.b: 小端的操作系统，会将内存中的多字节类型，按照低位低地址的类型排布。所以直接放入报文的话是这样的

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 298px; height: 1px; padding-top: 795px; margin-left: 31px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

span.b: char是单字节表示，在内存中逐个排列。所以不受大小端影响

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 668px; height: 1px; padding-top: 105px; margin-left: 371px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

span.b: 大端小端影响的是一种数据类型在内存中的排列顺序，但是对于类型之间的排布，还是按照先来的放在低地址进行排列
